Sharp Ice Spear

Critical hits deal triple damage. When attacking, has a [8%-10%] chance of landing a penetrating blow that will deal quadruple damage.
Once in a while, the unit ages the target of the attack. The target has its max health reduced by 30%, spell power reduced by 30%, and damage reduced by 30% for 4 sec.

Attacks against aged enemies steal 15% health from the target for 3 sec for the duration of the battle. Stacks up to 4 times.

Requirements: 98-100
